action_line: ask_user_question("\"questions\":[{\"header\":\"Trip dates\",\"question\":\"What future travel window should I use for the 4 evening departure dates, and should this be one-way or round-trip?\",\"options\":[{\"label\":\"Use sample dates\",\"description\":\"I’ll choose 4 evening departure dates in a coherent future window and compare one-way outbound fares.\"},{\"label\":\"I’ll provide dates\",\"description\":\"You’ll give me the exact travel window or 4 dates, plus whether it’s one-way or round-trip.\"}],\"custom\":true}]")
